Risk Title: For PCL, server issues arising from Database Monitoring could not be transferred over to PCL ServiceNow instance and hence could not be addressed timely
Risk Desc:
Princess Cruises Lines is a brand that we support as part of global database administration support. As part of this support, we have automated monitoring of all parameters that will impact availability of databases. One of the key parameters monitored is storage, which results in an alert, if any mount / folder exceeds 80% used storage

PCL has its own ServiceNow instance as against the global service now instance (carnival corp) that we use for converting our alerts into tickets for action. Due to lack of integration between Global and PCL ServiceNow instances, in case OS mount/folder points reach above threshold, our monitoring alerts are not reaching PCL ServiceNow for OS team action.

As a result, storage alerts that need to be actioned by PCL System team will not be actioned timely leading to critical PCL database availability issues and huge impact for Business Project-Level          Technical           Connectivity and access      Moderate      Likely      High
Category:
Ensure access for PCL ServiceNow instance (as the integration between Global ServiceNow and PCL ServiceNow is not working)
Work with PCL stakeholders to ensure that alerts impact OS storage can be automatically transferred or manually transferred to their ServiceNow queue based on analysis by Database team
Work with PCL stakeholders to determine a common monitoring strategy for OS mounts/folders.

We are already in touch with PCL stakeholders to address this issue and highlighted this risk in our global weekly status calls.
Risk Type: Work with PCL OS team to ensure alerts coming out of monitoring are addressed manually and timely

Risk Title: In case any issue happens with the threshold reaching to 100%
Risk Desc: work on a war footing to ensure the issue is addressed with minimal business disruption.

Context – SOW extension submitted as on 21stJuly 2024 post multiple discussions on conflicting requirements from Carnival Corp.

Condition – Under “Internal review” from customer side. No more scope or major changes expected. Being followed up for signature. ETA not known.

Consequence – Absence of SOW/SOW sing-off and clarity on contractual aspects might lead to contractual obligations and may lead to ambiguities w.r.t deliverables, roles and responsibilities of the resource, amount payable etc. Project-Level     Organizational                           Funding         Major    Possible      High
Category: We got the SOW signed off. so now we are green.
Risk Type: Customer has signed off the SOW.
